title: Gravel and Flint Bricks
description: A transition destination that offers a new version of old gravel and flint bricks.
body:
![GFB LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e0d7336f5af03b36e762006447335d315e8ce4_0.webp)
This mod allows you to process useless gravel and flint into building materials.gravel can be hardened in a furnace and processed into blocks by combining 9 flints.

Then, by combining four of the processed blocks, it can be processed into bricks.
Bricks can be processed into Slabs, stairs, and walls.

### FAQ
Q.  Can I include this in the mod pack?

A. Sure! You can include this MOD in your MOD pack.

Q. Is there a possibility of updating before 1.19?

A.This project was created with Mcreator, but Mcreator is not at all suitable for backports. If I feel inclined, I might use InteliJ to create it from scratch and make Version 2.0, but due to my inexperience, it might ultimately not be created. However, I definitely understand th

at you all are seeking it!

The latest updates can be checked on [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravel-and-flint-bricks)! We will also be updating here in due course, so if you want to play the latest version as soon as possible, go to [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravel-and-flint-bricks)!
